FeedItemID.description: The ID of the feeditem itself. Use this ID to confirm that the feed was succesfully processed

EntityID.description: The ID of the order or the ID of the document. Use this ID in the Order or Document API to fetch the data

PartyID.description: The ID of the company that uploaded the document. Use this ID in the contextPartyID header when downloading the order or document

FileContentSHA256Hash.description: SHA256 hash of byte array (not the Base64)
